explicitExclusions.reason: Test changes verify the runtime hardening but are not deployed runtime attack surfaces for this diff scan.
Planning artifact only; no runtime code or execution boundary.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/cli/gitinfo.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Change uses no-shell git status with a top-anchored pathspec for child workspaces; display-only dirty count does not alter project authority or command execution.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/commands/common.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Configured child project is selected only when it is contained by the launch cwd and passes existing safe-project checks; multiline input preserves user text and does not feed shell or path sinks.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/commands/onboard.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. YOLO persistence stores an explicit boolean default and initial chat passes the exact registered project id; this narrows workspace selection rather than expanding authority.
surfaces.riskArea: Onboarding default project and YOLO persistence

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/commands/stream.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Approval details now flow through safe view-model coercion, and trustPattern is omitted unless the trust decision is selected, preserving existing server-side approval validation.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/config/config.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. New defaults.autoApprove key is parsed as a boolean through the same strict config coercion used for other booleans; no secret or external data flow is introduced.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/terminal/session.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Approval display now uses the same coerced view model as stream mode, preventing crashes on malformed arrays without changing approval authority or auto-approval behavior.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/terminal/state.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Terminal task terminal events are ignored after an already-terminal status, preventing contradictory display state; this is a presentation guard and does not hide persisted orchestrator events.

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/terminal/task-event-adapter.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. New progress_warning maps to a warning notice only; it does not mutate permissions, approvals, task status, or tool authority.

surfaces.label: packages/contracts/src/index.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. The contract only adds task.progress_warning to the typed event enum; payload remains an unknown record and no trust boundary is relaxed.

surfaces.label: services/orchestrator/src/execution/adaptive-budget.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Result-aware progress hashes bounded observations with SHA-256; it does not expose raw observations beyond existing tool-result context or change permission enforcement.

surfaces.label: services/orchestrator/src/execution/agent.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. Raw tool arguments and outputs remain persisted; only model-facing oversized create_file/propose_patch arguments are replaced with compact placeholders after execution. Malformed patch recovery still reads current file content through assertContainedRealPath before feedback.
surfaces.riskArea: Tool argument context capping and patch recovery

surfaces.label: apps/cli/src/terminal/approval-view-model.ts
surfaces.notes: Full file reviewed. New view model accepts malformed approval details without throwing, defaults missing risk to medium, and returns display strings only; it does not approve, execute, or broaden trusted command patterns.
